query:
select * from (
                        select * from photos
                        where user_id is null
                          and trashed_on is null
                          and ($1 is null or created_at < $1 or (created_at = $1 and id < $2))
                        union all
                        select * from photos
                        where user_id = $3
                          and trashed_on is null
                          and ($1 is null or created_at < $1 or (created_at = $1 and id < $2))
                    )
                    order by created_at desc
                    limit $4
